description_long: This is a medium-sized spoon with a dark, wooden handle and a metallic, slightly oval bowl. The handle is faceted, giving it a sturdy, ergonomic grip, and tapers slightly toward the bowl. The bowl itself is smooth, shallow, and has a matte, dark metallic finish, suggesting it is made from stainless steel or a similar metal. The transition between the handle and the bowl is seamless, with the metal extending into the handle for added strength. The overall design is utilitarian yet elegant, suitable for both everyday use and more formal dining settings. The spoon shows no visible signs of wear or damage, maintaining a clean and well-maintained appearance.
description: A dark-handled spoon with a matte metallic bowl and a faceted, ergonomic grip. The design is clean, sturdy, and well-maintained.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the spoon, highlighting the faceted wooden handle and the shallow metallic bowl.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the wide, oval shape of the bowl and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the handle's faceted texture and the smooth transition to the metallic bowl.
description_view_3: View from the end of the handle, showing the circular cross-section of the handle and the bowl's edge.
attribute_orientation: bowl facing upward, handle extending horizontally
attribute_contextual_placement: resting flat on a surface or placed beside a plate
attribute_proximity_to_other_objects: often placed next to forks and knives or stacked with similar utensils
